# AnimatedPlot

Chart that steps through discrete frames of a dataset — one frame per distinct value of a field (e.g. `year`, `quarter`). Axes are fixed across all frames so values are comparable. Includes play/pause, scrub, and speed controls.

## Import

```javascript
import { AnimatedPlot } from '@rokkit/chart'
```

## Quick Start

```svelte
<script>
  import { AnimatedPlot } from '@rokkit/chart'
  import { browser } from '$app/environment'
  import { mpg } from './data/mpg.js'
</script>

{#if browser}
  <AnimatedPlot
    data={mpg}
    animate={{ by: 'year' }}
    x="class"
    y="hwy"
    geoms={[{ type: 'bar', stat: 'mean' }]}
  />
{/if}
```

`{#if browser}` is required — `AnimatedPlot` uses `requestAnimationFrame`, which is unavailable during SSR.

## Props

| Prop | Type | Default | Description |
|------|------|---------|-------------|
| `data` | `Object[]` | `[]` | Full dataset containing all frames |
| `animate` | `{ by, duration?, loop? }` | — | **Required.** Animation config |
| `x` | `string` | — | Field for the X axis |
| `y` | `string` | — | Field for the Y axis |
| `color` | `string` | — | Field for color assignment (consistent across frames) |
| `geoms` | `GeomSpec[]` | `[]` | Geom specs — same format as `PlotChart` |
| `width` | `number` | `600` | SVG width in pixels |
| `height` | `number` | `400` | SVG height in pixels |
| `grid` | `boolean` | `true` | Show horizontal gridlines |
| `legend` | `boolean` | `false` | Show color legend |
| `mode` | `'light' \| 'dark'` | `'light'` | Color palette mode |

## animate object

| Key | Type | Default | Description |
|-----|------|---------|-------------|
| `by` | `string` | — | Field whose distinct values become frames (sorted order) |
| `duration` | `number` | `800` | Milliseconds per frame at 1× speed |
| `loop` | `boolean` | `false` | Restart from the first frame after the last |

## Playback Controls

The built-in timeline renders below the chart:
- **Play / Pause** — start or stop auto-advance
- **Scrub slider** — jump directly to any frame
- **Frame label** — shows the current frame's key value
- **Speed selector** — 0.5×, 1×, 2×, 4× multipliers

Respects `prefers-reduced-motion` — auto-play is disabled when set.

## Color Encoding

```svelte
<AnimatedPlot
  data={mpg}
  animate={{ by: 'year', loop: true }}
  x="class" y="hwy"
  color="drv"
  geoms={[{ type: 'bar', stat: 'mean' }]}
  legend
/>
```

Color domain is fixed across all frames — categories keep consistent colors throughout the animation.

## Notes

- Missing data combinations for a frame are filled with zero so bars and lines animate smoothly
- Supports all geom types: `bar`, `line`, `point`, `area`
- Uses `AnimatedPlotBrewer` internally to manage frame state

## Related

- [PlotChart](/llms/packages/chart.txt) — static chart (same geom API)
- [FacetPlot](/llms/components/facet-plot.txt) — small-multiples layout
